SEARCH
Package mvc.model

Class Model

java.lang.Object
mvc.model.Model
public class Model extends Object
Represents the Model component in the MVC pattern. Its primary task is the implementation of the homophonic substitution cipher. This includes: - Homophonic key generation. Key is generated based on customizable parameters such as single phonogram length, maximal and minimal number of phonograms per letter. - Encoding of strings. - Decoding of strings according to generated key as well as the default key. Encoding characters (phonograms) length and number assinged to letters can be customized, however combination of these values must meet specific requirements so that a valid key can be generated.
Version:
1.2
Author:
Milosz Liniewiecki

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Model()
    Constructs the Model instances and initilizes internal parameters: allEncodedCharacters, allPhonograms, key, frequencyTable, nonHandledCharacters.

  • Constructor Details

    • Model

      public Model()
      Constructs the Model instances and initilizes internal parameters: allEncodedCharacters, allPhonograms, key, frequencyTable, nonHandledCharacters. The frequency table is initilized with letters from the english alphabet.

  • Method Details

    • init

      public void init(@NonNull @NonNull KeyParameters params)
      Initilizes fields related to key generation.
      Parameters:
      params - Parameters needed to initiate key generation.

    • addHistoryRecord

      public void addHistoryRecord(@NonNull @NonNull String info)
      Adds a history record to historyList. Id of the record is determiend based on the number of already existing records in the list.
      Parameters:
      info - Stirng wih information that will be stored.

    • getHistoryList

      public List<HistoryRecord> getHistoryList()
      Getter for the historyList.
      Returns:
      Returns the history list.

    • clearHistoryList

      public void clearHistoryList()
      Clears the contents of the historyList.

    • appendKeyToHistory

      public void appendKeyToHistory()
      Adds all key entries into the history list historyList. Each letter and its phonograms is a single new record.

    • encrypt

      public String encrypt(@NonNull @NonNull String inputString)
      Accepts a message string and encrypts it according to key. Trailing and preceding whitespaces are removed if they are present. Whitespaces are treates as plain text separator and thus are not encoded. Function iterates over all letters from the input string and assignes each one a randomly selected phonogram according to the key.
      Parameters:
      inputString - string that is to be encrypted.
      Returns:
      Encrypted string.

    • decrypt

      public String decrypt(@NonNull @NonNull String inputString) throws UnknownPhonogramException, StringIndexOutOfBoundsException
      Accepts a message string, composed of phonograms and decodes it to english alphabet. Removes leading and trailing whitespaces. Whitespaces are not decoded, they remain unchanged. Function iterates over phongrams, keyParameters field phonogramLength specify single phonogram length. Each phonogram is mapped to letter from english alphabet present in the key.
      Parameters:
      inputString - encoded string should contain only digits and spaces.
      Returns:
      input string decrypted to english alphabet.
      Throws:
      UnknownPhonogramException - in case an unknwn phonogram has been encountered during decoding.
      StringIndexOutOfBoundsException - in case the decoded words length was different than multiple of keyParameters phonogramLength.

    • testEncryptedString

      public boolean testEncryptedString(@NonNull @NonNull String inputString) throws UnknownPhonogramException, StringIndexOutOfBoundsException
      Validates encrypted string, if it contains legal phonogram characters (phonogram must belong to allPhonograms. Leading and trailing whitespaces are removed. Spaces that take more than one space are normalised. Splits the given string on whitespaces and iterates over specific words. Extracts phonograms of length phonogramLength (keyParameters) and checks if allPhonograms contains it.
      Parameters:
      inputString - Encoded string that we want to decode.
      Returns:
      true if the string is valid and contains only known phongrams. Otherwise exception is thrown.
      Throws:
      UnknownPhonogramException - in case an unknown phonogram has been found in the string.
      StringIndexOutOfBoundsException

    • checkStringForEncoding

      public boolean checkStringForEncoding(@NonNull @NonNull String inputString)
      Validates the string for encoding process. Removes multiple, leading and trailing whitespaces from the given string and validates if it is good for encoding.
      Parameters:
      inputString - Input string which is to be encoded.
      Returns:
      True in case string is good for encoding, False otherwise.

    • clearKey

      public void clearKey()
      Clears the contents of key.

    • generateKey

      public void generateKey()
      For each letter from allEncodedCharacters an array of encryption charaters is generated. Number of phonograms assigned to each letter depends on the frequency of that letter frequencyTable. Phonograms are generated as integer numbers of fixed length.

    • generateDefaultKey

      public void generateDefaultKey()
      Assigns each letter from allEncodedCharacters a single encryption character. Length of a phonogram is specified by keyParameters phonogramLength = 3.

    • isPhonogramsNumSufficient

      public boolean isPhonogramsNumSufficient(@NonNull @NonNull KeyParameters suggestedParams)
      Checks if provided combination of minimal and maximal numbers of phongrams, assigned to a single letter as well as the length of a phonogram are valid. Total number of generated phonogram characters is equal 10^N, where N = phonogramLength, from keyParameters. It must exceed value returned by suggestedNumberOfPhonograms(int, int). If so, the combination of parameters is considered valid.
      Parameters:
      suggestedParams - Suggested values for the key parameters.
      Returns:
      true in case of valid parameter combination.
